nasb.text: Their banquets are accompanied by lyre and harp, by tambourine and flute, and by wine; But they do not pay attention to the deeds of the Lord, Nor do they consider the work of His hands.

esv.text: They have lyre and harp, tambourine and flute and wine at their feasts, but they do not regard the deeds of the Lord, or see the work of his hands.

cnv.text: 在他們的筵席上，有琴、瑟、手鼓、笛和酒， 但他們不理耶和華的作為， 也不留心他手所作的。

ccb.text: 席上，他们在琴、瑟、鼓、笛声中饮酒作乐， 却毫不理会耶和华的作为。

csbs.text: 他们的宴席上有竖琴、里拉琴、铃鼓、横笛和酒， 但他们没有注目耶和华的作为， 也没有注视他手所做的。
